translation.بنده شهروز بذارفشان، با اخرین مدرک تحصیل: I’m a senior full-stack developer, and I’ve been working in software development since 2015. I really enjoy building clean, fast, and user-friendly interfaces. With a solid backend background i’ve built backend services to support UI also web pages with charts, real-time data, and WebSocket connections, and I care a lot about performance and good UX. I’ve worked with Node.js and .NET, designed APIs, and in front-end familiar with most of javascript based frameworks like Next.js and react.
translation.شهروز بذرافشان هستم و در حال حاضر به عنو: I am Shahrooz Bazrafshan, currently working as a senior developer in client-side coding using Next.js. I have followed a path full of experience and learning, which includes front-end development with React and Next.js, back-end development with .NET and Node.js, as well as designing and implementing mobile applications with React Native. Creating efficient, beautiful, and widely-used applications that make users' lives easier has always been one of my main goals. Along this journey, gaining the trust of managers, achieving team success, and creating real value for users are among my greatest honors. Believing in continuous learning and keeping up with modern technologies, I am active in roles such as Team Lead and Senior Developer, and I am looking for new challenges for personal and team growth.
translation.برنامه نویسی مهارتیست که با تلاش بدست می: Programming is an skill that comes with effort, get stronger with practice and experience and will be up to date with learning
